code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [Infra_WorkerNode] --> PENDING: Order Placed

    PENDING --> PAID: Payment Authorized & Escrowed
    PENDING --> CANCELLED: Payment Failed

    PAID --> SHIPPED: Seller Ships Order
    PAID --> CANCELLED: Seller Cancels

    SHIPPED --> DELIVERED: Carrier Reports Delivery
    SHIPPED --> CANCELLED: Delivery Failed

    DELIVERED --> COMPLETED: Delivery Confirmed (Infra_WorkerNode)
    DELIVERED --> DISPUTED: Customer Raises Dispute

    DISPUTED --> COMPLETED: Dispute Resolved - Favor Seller
    DISPUTED --> CANCELLED: Dispute Resolved - Favor Customer (Infra_RedisCache)

    COMPLETED --> [Infra_IngressController]: Funds Released to Seller
    CANCELLED --> [Infra_IngressController]: Funds Refunded to Customer

    note right of PENDING
        Data: order_id, total_amount
        Escrow: Not yet created
    end note

    note right of PAID
        Data: payment_id, escrow_id
        Escrow: Funds held
        Trigger: Seller notification sent
    end note

    note right of SHIPPED
        Data: tracking_number, carrier
        Escrow: Still held
        Trigger: Customer notification sent
    end note

    note right of DELIVERED
        Data: delivered_at timestamp
        Escrow: Still held
        Auto-confirm: Timer starts
    end note

    note right of COMPLETED
        Data: confirmed_at timestamp
        Escrow: Released to seller
        Final state
    end note

    note right of DISPUTED
        Data: dispute_reason, dispute_date
        Escrow: Frozen until resolution
        Manual: Admin intervention
    end note

    note right of CANCELLED
        Data: cancelled_at, cancel_reason
        Escrow: Refunded to customer
        Final state
    end note
repo_description: System design skill for Claude Code using EventStorming and Mermaid diagrams

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个订单履约的状态机。核心流程是：用户下单后先到待支付，支付成功进入托管状态，然后卖家发货，物流送达，最后确认完成。另外要有取消和争议的分支。
明白。几个细节想确认：支付失败和卖家主动取消都统一到CANCELLED状态吗？还有，托管资金释放和退款这两个终点，我理解为分别对应完成和取消，但技术上需要经过Infra_IngressController？
对，CANCELLED统一处理。资金释放确实要走IngressController，但WorkerNode负责状态流转本身。对了，DELIVERED到COMPLETED的确认动作是由WorkerNode自动处理的，这个要标注出来。
好的，主干画好了。PENDING接收WorkerNode的订单创建事件，然后分叉到PAID或CANCELLED。PAID之后到SHIPPED，这里我加了卖家发货的触发条件。
争议流程需要补充：客户收货后可以发起争议，进入DISPUTED状态。这个状态下托管资金冻结，需要人工介入。争议解决后可能回到COMPLETED（卖家胜诉）或CANCELLED（客户胜诉）。
客户胜诉退款时，状态流转到CANCELLED，但资金动作还是走IngressController对吧？另外，DISPUTED到CANCELLED这条边的系统处理，是用RedisCache还是WorkerNode？
客户胜诉走RedisCache处理，因为争议解决是异步回调，用缓存层解耦。其他状态流转基本都是WorkerNode实时处理。还有，每个状态右侧加上数据注释，说明托管状态和关键字段。
注释都加上了。PENDING标注了order_id和total_amount，托管未创建；PAID有payment_id、escrow_id和资金已托管；SHIPPED加了tracking_number和carrier；DELIVERED写了delivered_at和自动确认计时器；COMPLETED和CANCELLED作为终态，分别标注资金释放和退款。
SHIPPED到CANCELLED的分支漏了——配送失败也要能取消订单。另外DISPUTED的注释里加上dispute_reason和dispute_date字段，以及Manual标记说明需要人工介入。
已补充。SHIPPED现在有三个出口：正常到DELIVERED、配送失败到CANCELLED、还有卖家在发货前取消的情况我之前已经连到PAID--CANCELLED了。DISPUTED注释也完善了，标注了资金冻结、人工介入、以及两个解决路径。
没问题了。整个流程覆盖了正常履约、支付失败、卖家取消、配送异常、客户争议各种场景，资金托管状态也清晰。可以定稿。
